message: WMI-1 shared-state divergence (signal-set-unchecked): 'unix_seqpacket_sendmsg' sets signal field 'msghdr.msg_namelen', which a different component branches on to reinterpret the object — a candidate ungoverned signal. [mechanism:unchecked-signal-field-set;indicates=WMI-1] [mem:struct=msghdr;field=msg_namelen;offset=8] [oracle:assert=msghdr.msg_namelen stays within the domain its consumer's agreement governs;assume=producer sets msg_namelen without enforcing the consumer's cross-field invariant]
